# PIP — Mini Game Reward & Insight Unlock Logic

**Status:** Current Approved Reward Logic  
**Scope:** Reward outcomes generated by a completed Mini Game Attempt  
**Related Flow:** `mini_game_flow.md`

## 1. Boundary
This document defines:
- 100 / 200 ค่าประสบการณ์ outcomes
- Immediate Rewarded Ad action
- Locked Insight unlock after claiming 100
- Unlocking a previous Attempt
- Permanent Insight unlock behavior

It does not define subscription pricing, VIP allocation schedules, billing behavior, or general ad placements.

## 2. Base Reward
Every completed 10-question Mini Game Attempt has a base reward:

| Completed Action | Base Reward |
|---|---:|
| Complete 10 questions | 100 ค่าประสบการณ์ |

Rules:
- Applies whether the Attempt is passed or failed.
- Access status does not automatically double the base reward.
- Once the user confirms the 100 reward, that Attempt cannot later receive retroactive x2.

## 3. Free User — Immediate Post-Stage Decision
At Quick Result, when Insight is locked:

| Action | Final Reward | Insight Outcome |
|---|---:|---|
| `รับ 100 ค่าประสบการณ์` | 100 | Remains locked |
| `ดูโฆษณา รับ x2 + ปลดล็อก Insight` | 200 | Permanently unlocked for that Attempt |

Approved UI copy:
- Card title: `รับเพิ่มพร้อมเปิดบทวิเคราะห์`
- Description: `ดูโฆษณา 1 ครั้ง เพื่อรับ 200 ค่าประสบการณ์ และปลดล็อก Insight พร้อมเฉลยครบทุกข้อถาวร`
- Primary button: `ดูโฆษณา รับ x2 + ปลดล็อก Insight`
- Secondary button: `รับ 100 ค่าประสบการณ์`

When the immediate Rewarded Ad completes successfully:
- Set `final_reward = 200`.
- Set `x2_used = true`.
- Set `x2_source = rewarded_ad`.
- Unlock Insight permanently.
- Set `insight_unlock_source = rewarded_ad_immediate`.

## 4. Claiming 100 Then Opening Locked Insight
If a Free User selects `รับ 100 ค่าประสบการณ์`:
- Set `final_reward = 100`.
- Finalize the reward decision.
- Keep Insight locked.
- Allow the user to enter Locked Summary & Insight immediately.

Locked Insight action:
- `ดูโฆษณาเพื่อเปิด Insight`

Copy:
- Heading: `ปลดล็อก Insight ของด่านนี้`
- Description: `ดูโฆษณา 1 ครั้ง เพื่อเปิดเฉลยและบทวิเคราะห์ครบทุกข้อถาวร`
- Notice: `การปลดล็อกครั้งนี้ไม่เพิ่มค่าประสบการณ์ย้อนหลัง`

Success outcome:
- Insight becomes permanently unlocked.
- Final reward remains `100`.
- Set `insight_unlock_source = rewarded_ad_locked_screen`.
- Do not grant retroactive x2.

## 5. Unlocking a Previous Locked Attempt
A previous locked Attempt opened from Stage Path or History may offer:
- `ดูโฆษณาเพื่อเปิด Insight`

After successful Rewarded Ad completion:
- Insight becomes permanently unlocked.
- Original final reward remains unchanged.
- Set `insight_unlock_source = rewarded_ad_history`.
- Do not grant retroactive x2.

## 6. Permanent Unlock Rule
Once Insight is unlocked for an Attempt:
- It remains unlocked permanently.
- It can be reopened for free.
- It must not require another unlock ad.
- Its unlocked state is not removed when an external entitlement expires.

## 7. Failed Attempt Reward Rule
The same reward and Insight unlock choices apply to failed Attempts.
- Failing affects progression, not reward-choice eligibility.
- Unlocking Insight does not convert failure into a pass.
- A new passing Attempt is required to open the next stage.

## 8. Rewarded Ad Failure / Cancellation
If an optional Rewarded Ad fails, is interrupted, or is not completed:
- Do not award 200.
- Do not unlock Insight through that action.
- Return the user to the previous choice state.
- Allow retry or the non-ad option where applicable.

## 9. Reward Outcome Matrix
| Situation | Final Reward | Insight |
|---|---:|---|
| Free User accepts base reward | 100 | Locked |
| Free User watches immediate x2 + unlock ad | 200 | Permanently unlocked |
| Free User accepts 100 then unlocks from current Locked screen | 100 | Permanently unlocked |
| Free User unlocks later from review/history | Original value | Permanently unlocked |
| External entitlement opens Insight | Reward determined by selected reward action | Permanently unlocked |

## 10. Required Reward Data
| Field | Allowed Values / Description |
|---|---|
| `base_reward` | `100` |
| `final_reward` | `100` or `200` |
| `reward_finalized` | `true` / `false` |
| `x2_used` | `true` / `false` |
| `x2_source` | `rewarded_ad`, `vip_subscription_ticket`, or `none` |
| `insight_status` | `locked` / `unlocked` |
| `insight_unlock_source` | `rewarded_ad_immediate`, `rewarded_ad_locked_screen`, `rewarded_ad_history`, `vip_reward_active`, `vip_subscription_active`, or `none` |

## 11. Locked Decisions
- Completion reward starts at 100 ค่าประสบการณ์.
- Optional immediate Rewarded Ad grants 200 ค่าประสบการณ์ and permanent Insight unlock.
- Accepting 100 finalizes reward value for that Attempt.
- Insight may still be unlocked after accepting 100, but x2 is not granted retroactively.
- Failed users receive the same reward/Insight choices.
- Insight unlock is permanent per Attempt.
